violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the (cafeteria ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The ceilings and ceiling vents in kitchen have an accumulation of food debris and/or dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
The door to the employee toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

Ceiling panel observed missing in salad bar area and several ceiling vents observed with an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities must be maintained in clean and good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025

(Deli meat ) was observed thawing in water at the prep sink Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025
The door to the (kitchen) toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (cafeteria), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
Leak observed at plumbing under prep sink. Systems must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The door to the (restroom ) toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, turkey was placed hot in the refrigerator in a covered container. PIC informed and removed plastic wrap for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
Observed prep sink to be leaking from bottom pipe. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of slicer and ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris and pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by mice droppings next to ice machine. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. By person in charge Pest control is active 1X month. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

The door to the outside, located in the site door next to dining area is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
The ice guard at the ice machine is in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans at the walk-in cooler unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink dishwasher area is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
A small ice condensate is observed behind fans at the walk-in freezer. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered, and lids are broken. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnable shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and service area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
The women's bathroom is lacking a receptable with a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
The ice machine filter(observed leakage) in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

The fans in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
